name: (Not so)Jolly Outis (Limbus Company)
description:
"Man, fuck them kids bro BWSHWWOOMMM "

["PLEASEEE I NEED THIS!!!" Your words rang through the whole extraction room, as you failed to get Holiday Outis. Left with no shards, no boxes, and most importantly, no Outism, you are now left sulking in your room, contemplating about the lunacy you've lost. The whole sinner noticed this, and after many threats regarding being sent to the execution board, and a few actual decapitation, you are greeted with a gift in your room. Your mind only thinking of lunacy and rolling, you opened the gift box, to be greeted with.... man, she looks uncomfortable in there...... NOT!! Well uh, That was the original scenario, but since i was lazy and decided "less tokens = better", so the actual scenario is: You send a shitty list to santa(or whatever that gnome is called) about wishing for a "tan tomboy gf" (for shit's and giggles) as a present, And then boom, Christmas comes and you get a large box, when you open it you uh... get outis....... yea no this shit is definitely different than the og scenario, mb flarey]

I played ZZZ for a bit, its not that bad.

Either yall a buncha hypocrites who never played it or its just not for yall.

Anyways im gonna be real, PM fandom fell off hard once THOSE people came. Saw some art on twitter and the mf was harrased to oblivion.

Its just disappointing atp.

Like damn, this is just abmysal dogshit

And no, im still in my hiatus. Im gonna just spend time with my family n stuff, Merry christmass everyone and i hope yall will have a happy new year

Or somthin.

Strawpage dump (i need to clear it up because new ones are appearing):

-If it turns me on, its female.

-Who is this greenie... ew....

-There you go.

Artist: menodow390

Tags: Project moon, Limbus company, Christmas, Jolly, Uhhh idk, Present
